changelog.title: Welcome popup removed
changelog.desc: The Getting Started guide lives on your dashboard now, so the popup is gone. What's New will show automatically whenever there's a real update.

changelog.title: AI Instruction Field Working
changelog.desc: Instructions you type before generating are now properly followed by the AI in both the Writing Studio and content cards.

changelog.title: Clean Output, No Markdown
changelog.desc: Generated content no longer contains em dashes, asterisks, pound signs, or other markdown formatting symbols.

changelog.title: This Week's Focus Saves Correctly
changelog.desc: Focus items now persist properly between sessions.

changelog.title: Surprise Me on the Panic Button
changelog.desc: No idea what to post? Hit Surprise Me and get a random content idea plus full creative direction with no topic needed.
